examples: An unremarkable shrub on the gravel plain moved and resolved into an ostrich.
Like an ostrich, she thought that if she couldn't see me, then I don't exist.
For example, the ostrich has plumage that is so constructed that the feathers are long but not too dense.
About 1, 500 cooks used 1, 000kg (2, 200lbs) of ostrich meat to make the 1, 500m (4, 920ft) long sandwich.
Customers have also asked for their cars to be trimmed in buffalo and ostrich skin.
